issues.description: Action type is 'RemoveLife' but card text says 'trash 1 card from the top of your Life cards', which is FlipLife (converting Life to hand), not RemoveLife (permanent removal)
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and FlipLife action has no clear trigger source or condition; this appears to be duplicate/incorrect logic
Card text uses 'may' indicating optional action, but DSL does not reflect this optionality via 'optional' flag
Target scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' is correct but should verify maxCost:7 matches 'cost of 7 or less' condition
